dots_and_boxes.name: Dots & Boxes
dots_and_boxes.description: Draw lines to complete boxes. Complete a box to score a point and go again.
dots_and_boxes.hint_draw: Your turn — click a line to draw
dots_and_boxes.how_to_play:
Players take turns drawing one line segment between two adjacent dots — horizontally or vertically.
If your line completes the fourth side of a box, you claim it, score a point, and take another turn.
You can keep going as long as you keep completing boxes.
When all lines are drawn the player with more boxes wins.
Tip: avoid drawing the third side of a box — you're handing your opponent a free score.
